problem_statement: How to reliably generate deterministic, safety-compliant IEC 61131-3 PLC code with prompt-engineered LLMs across heterogeneous vendor ecosystems, and rigorously validate its correctness and safety before deployment.
insufficiency_evidence: BLEU 'operates at a surface level and cannot guarantee semantic correctness or compliance with safety-critical requirements'; LITL 'remains a proxy for expert judgment' so HITL in vendor IDEs supplies the authoritative safety checks
solution_mechanisms: LLM-in-the-loop semantic scoring by independent validator LLMs
BLEU lexical triage with escalation triggers
key_constructs: Adaptive Prompt Scoring and Reinforcement Layer
notes: Full text truncated in the middle; some tables/appendices abbreviated.
